This schedule consists of agendas prepared for each Board or Commission meeting and minutes from each meeting which are a summary of what occurred at each Board or Commission meeting. Minute books or red books are books which include, but are not limited to, the orders of the Commission or Board, Superintendent reports, minutes and agendas of the Board or Commission meeting.

retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy of the Audit Work Paper Files in the operating area for 1 year. Once paper is scanned and electronic images checked for accuracy and completeness, destroy paper. ; Electronic: Keep scanned images for 10 years.

series_description: Claim Files consist of an OUF-6 Unclaimed Funds Claim Form containing owner detail information provided by the original holder that reported and remitted the funds to the Director. The OUF-6 Form is completed and signed by the claimaint and submitted with documentary proof of ownership, including personal identification and/or tax identification number(s). Claim files also include correspondence exchanged between the Division and claimant as well as other documents relevant to the claim.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper claim files are shredded 60 days after assigned to a claims examiner ; Electronic: Scanned images are retained permanently.

series_title: Application for Finder Certificate of Registration
series_description: This record retention schedule consists of Applications for Finder Certificate of Registration and accompanying documentation submitted to the Division.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper until application and all supporting documentation is properly imaged and indexed. once images are confirmed as complete and legible paper can be shredded. ; Electronic: Electronic images are to be retained as long as the Certificate of Finder Registration is valid. Scanned images are to be retained for ten years after the final expiration date of the registration, withdrawal of an application or denial of an application.

series_description: This record retention schedule consists of the results obtained from criminal background check conducted by BCI and other law enforcement agencies for applicants for certificates of finder registration.
retention_statement: Paper: For background checks that produce no criminal records for the applicant, retain paper copy until approval of application and the issuance of a finder registration to the applicant. For background checks that produce criminal records for the applicant, retain paper copy until the application is denied and the expiration of time of all potential applicant''s appeals has passed.

series_description: This record retention schedule consists of signed certificates of disposal completed by the Division.
retention_statement: Paper: Original paper copies are maintained by Support Services at Tussing Rd. ; Electronic: Scanned images are maintained for two years after the date the records are destroyed.

series_description: This retention schedule consists of reports or communications from the Ohio Attorney General''s Office to the Division regarding the status of pending Division cases.
retention_statement: Electronic: Two years from the date of receipt.

series_description: This record retention schedule consists of invoices submitted to the Division Accountability Section for payment.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until electronically imaged. Once image is reviewed to verify legibility and completeness shred paper. ; Electronic: Retain for three fiscal years from the fiscal year in which they are approved.

series_description: This record series contains all records maintained with the "AMANDA" database system. This system is an electronic database containing electronic records pertaining to the operations of the Bureau of Building Code Compliance, which includes both plan review and field inspection staff; the Bureau of Operations and Maintenance, including the Bedding, Elevator, and Boiler sections; the Bureau of Wage & Hour Administration; the Manufactured Homes Program; the Board of Building Appeals; and the Backflow Advisory Board. Records within the database include information pertaining to applicants for and holders of various licenses, certificates, and permits issued by the Division of Industrial Compliance and its related administrative boards, billing and invoice information, as well as records of inspections and investigations.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Original documents detailing the identification, transfer, invoicing, and repayment of Attorney unclaimed funds properties to and by the Ohio Access to Justice Foundation.
retention_statement: Electronic: permanent

series_title: Manufactured Home Installer License Applications and Renewals
series_description: Records relating to the application for or renewal of manufactured home installer licenses. This record series includes, but is not limited to, applications, renewal forms, correspondence associated with an application or renewal of an installer license, employment verifications, reference letters, licenses, denials of licenses, continuing education records, installation examination results, proof of insurance and workers' compensation compliance, surety bond, etc..
retention_statement: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist ; Electronic: The record shall be destroyed three years after submission.

series_title: Manufactured Home Park Operator License Applications and Renewals
series_description: Documents relating to the application, renewal, issuance, and denial of a manufactured home park operator license. This records series include, but is not limited to, the licenses, application and renewal forms, and associated correspondences.
retention_statement: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist ; Electronic: The record shall be destroyed three years after submission.

series_title: Training Agency and Course Applications and Renewals
series_description: Documents relating to the application for or renewal of training agencies approvals, initial licensing course approvals, or continuing education course approvals.
retention_statement: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist ; Electronic: The record shall be destroyed two years after submission.

series_title: Requests to Take MH Licensing Exam
series_description: Records relating to the request to take licensing exam for prospective manufactured home installers or inspectors, grant or denial of, and any accompanying paperwork.
retention_statement: Electronic: The record shall be destroyed three years after the request was submitted. ; Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist

series_description: Manufactured home inspection seals that have not been issued for a manufactured home installation permit
retention_statement: Paper: The record shall be retained until its contents have been entered into the MHP Seal Report.

series_description: Documents relating to the application, grant or denial of, and extension of a flood plain management permit, excepting the development plans that have been approved. This record series includes, but is not limited to, applications, grants or denials of a permit or extension, foundation drawings, site plans, blocking diagrams, flood plain management permits, and notices of expiring permit.
retention_statement: Electronic: The record shall be retained until one year after the permit is denied, the manufactured home park referenced in the permit is closed, or the permit expires, whichever is later. ; Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, notices of hearings, violations, or opportunity to request a hearing; requests for a hearing; hearing documention; adjudication orders, determinations, and any other documentation of the outcome of a hearing or decision; settlement and negotiation documents; motions; entries; exhibits; transcript of the hearing; objections; evidence; and correspondence relating to a hearing.
retention_statement: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist ; Electronic: The record shall be destroyed five years after the last enforcement or administrative action occurred in the case, so long as all appeals periods have expired.

series_description: Records relating to complaints that the Division of Industrial Compliance receives involving alleged violations of Chapter 4781 of the Ohio Revised Code or Chapters 4781-6, 4781-7, 4781-8, 4781-9, and 4781-12 of the Ohio Administrative Code. This record series includes, but it not limited to, complaints, documentation received with a complaint, complaint inspection reports, inspection report photos, violation acknowledgment forms, proof of corrections, and extension requests.
retention_statement: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist ; Electronic: The record shall be destroyed three years after the complaint was opened.

series_description: Records relating to the inspection of manufactured home parks, excepting inspections performed in response to a complaint or investigation of a potential non-compliance. This record series includes, but is not limited to, annual park inspection reports, verification inspection reports for development and/or flood plain management in parks, flood inspection reports, proof of corrections, extension requests, and associated correspondences.
retention_statement: Electronic: The record shall be destroyed three years from the date of the inspection report. ; Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist

series_description: Notifications from manufactured home park operators of changes to the manufactured home park. These records include, but are not limited to, manufactured home placement/removal reports, park inventories, change in licensed park lot notices, change in ownership notices, and closing notifications.
retention_statement: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist ; Electronic: The record shall be retained until one year after the relevant manufactured home park is closed or until one year after the record is superseded.

series_title: Manufactured Home Park Development Approval Documentation
series_description: Records relating to the application for, grant or denial of, and extension of approval of manufactured home park development plans. This record series includes, but is not limited to, applications, development plans, grants or denials of approval, requests for amendment, and requests for extension.
retention_statement: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist ; Electronic: The record shall be retained until one year after the referenced manufactured home park is closed, the plans are superseded by approved development plans for the same manufactured home park, the approval of such plans expires, or the plan approval is denied, whichever is later.

series_description: Records relating to manufactured home installation permits. This record series includes, but is not limited to, applications, grants or denials of a permit or extension; installation permits; temporary occupancy permits; notices of expiring permit; alternative designs; installation plans; foundation designs; homeowner/installation agreements; and inspection reports.
retention_statement: Electronic: The record shall be destroyed three years after the expiration/revocation of the installation permit (including any extension periods), three years after the denial of an installation permit, or three years after the date a home passed a final inspection, whichever is later. ; Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist

series_description: The rosters or reports by a training agency of the individuals who completed or failed to complete a training agency course.
retention_statement: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist ; Electronic: The record shall be destroyed three years after the course was held.

series_title: Manufactured Home Inspector and Inspection Agency Certification Applications and Renewals
series_description: Records relating to the application, denial, or renewal of certifications for manufactured home inspectors, third party inspection agencies, and building and health departments who perform installation inspections. This record series includes, but is not limited to, applications; renewal forms; denials of certification or renewals of certification; correspondence associated with an application, denial, or renewal of a certification; continuing education records; certification examination results; training course records; proof of insurance and workers' compensation compliance; surety bonds, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist ; Electronic: The record shall be destroyed three years after submission.

series_title: Unassociated Photograph, Negatives Files, and evidentiary records –All Investigations
series_description: Legacy Investigatory photograph negatives, photos, and other legacy evidentiary records unassociated with investigation files or otherwise unidentifiable, up to year 2019.
retention_statement: Paper: Shred original paper photo, negative or record as they are obsolete or of no evidentiary value. ; Electronic: Delete electronic paper photo, negative or record as they are obsolete or of no evidentiary value. ; Microform: Shred microfilm until as records contained therein are obsolete or of no evidentiary value.
disposition: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred

retention_statement: Electronic: If report is affiliated with an open investigation, incorporate electronic copy with case file and apply appropriate schedule thereafter. Retain all other electronic records indefinitely. ; Paper: Enter data in computer system, scan original document into machine readable format. Upon confirmation scanned copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy paper copy

series_title: SFM Forensic Lab Quality Assurance Files
series_description: Records consist of quality assurance records relating to the State Fire Marshal Forensic Laboratory’s Ansi National Accreditation Board (ANAB) program requirements including but not limited to, reports from internal audits, management reviews, records of corrective actions, records of preventative actions, proficiency tests, courtroom testimony reviews, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: one ANAB cycle of accreditation or four years, whichever is longer ; Electronic: one ANAB cycle of accreditation or four years, whichever is longer

series_description: Investigative documentation including but not limited to evidence documents, subpoenas, statements, consent forms, insurance information, advice of rights, reports, audio and/or video, and any other pertinent documentation collected.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area, enter statistical data, and scan additional documents into case file. Retain original paper file until deemed obsolete or of no evidentiary value. ; Electronic: Retain electronic records until deemed obsolete or of no evidentiary value. ; Microform: Retain microfilm until deemed obsolete or of no evidentiary value.
disposition: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred

series_description: File folders for each manufacturer containing applications; incoming and outgoing correspondence relating to changes in quality control personnel and/or procedures, addresses and telephone numbers; no production notices; unpaid invoices notices, and any o
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until manufacturer leaves program

series_description: File contains form submitted by canidates to take the Pressure Piping competency exam. Contains name and address, date of birth and social security number of candidate. Form requires attachement of complete education/work history, three non-relative ref
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in operating area for 5 years

series_description: As required by 4101.8 of the Ohio Administrative Code, this record is sent to the agency by the special inspector to report on all Pressure Piping systems that have been inspected during the reporting period.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in operating area for 5 years

series_description: File contains isometric drawings plus floor plans of a commercial building. Included in the plans is plumbing for waste, vents, and portable water. Floor plans shows fixtures.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 2 years

series_description: File contains minutes from the Safety Inspector Advisory Board meetings. These meetings take place within a 4 to 6 week period.
retention_statement: Microform: Transfer microfilm to archives ; Paper: Retain advisory meeting minutes until records are superseded by new information or until records are no longer created in this agency

series_description: Retain hard copy records until informatin is entered onto a computer data base system, then destroy hard copy records. Maintain machine readable records until information is superseded by new information or until records series is no longer created, then
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain machine readable records until information is superseded by new information or until records series is no longer created ; Paper: Retain hard copy records until information is entered onto a computer data base system

series_description: File contains requests and receipts from Divisions for issue of gasoline credit cards, and any other related material.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: (Green) Voucher detailing payment plus interest and claimant information, also contain social security # on voucher.
retention_statement: Microform: Retain master film in off site storage for 50 years

series_description: Agencies use this form to summarize all out-of- state travel done by personnel for each quarter.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: These records contain the date of the request for public records, name, address, and phone # of the person making the request, the forms in which the request was received, (by phone, written or in person), the documents requested, documents of information given, records denied the requestor, if an, and by whose authority they were denied, in what form the information was given and the date of the response to the request.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in the office area until the end of each year

series_description: File contains the inspection report which states all of the necessary information of the internal inspection of a boiler giving specific size, type, name of manufacturer, location of boiler name and address of owner or user, owner number, state number, Ohio standard number, National Board number and the date manufactured, and any related information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 months after scanned ; Electronic: Retain machine readable until notified that boiler has been scrapped

series_description: Cost of sales by brand by month.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 15 generation data group generations

series_description: Records of merchandise to be pulled by warehouses for shipment to agencies.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 6 days

series_description: File contains application number, owners' name and address, project name and location, contractor name and address, type of system to be installed, substance to be carried in system, operating pressure, approximate starting date, actual cost of installati
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain machine readable records on the Ohio Data Network computer system until information is superseded by new information or until record series is no longer created ; Paper: Retain 5 years after release of audit report by Auditor of State

series_title: Cash Journal for Completed Elevator Insp
series_description: File contains name of payee, amount paid, payee address and any other related information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years in operating area, or until audited by State Auditor and report is released

series_description: File contain records of elevators that are no longer in service.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy records for 1 year after the elevator has been taken out of service.

series_description: File contains document which is completed by our field inspectors which communicates to our laboratory personnel that a sample was not secured for analysis purposes.
retention_statement: Paper: After decision has been made, retain for 1 year

series_description: Tickets are used to record the mileage of travel, the condition of the car, purchase of gas, and other related material.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: Sales/Inventory by agency by brand by period.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 50 generation data group generations

series_description: Financial Statement data
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 25 generation data group generations

series_title: AS/400 System Documentation and Training Manuals
series_description: The AS/400 system documentation shows various tasks that can be performed by the systems/operations section of ISS for the monitoring, maintaining and performance of the AS/400. The AS/400 training manuals are created by ISS personnel and are given to users who attend training classes manual consists of many exercises and examples of operating procedures for the AS/400 applications.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain the AS/400 system documentation and training manuals in the computer room until determined to be no longer of administrative value

series_description: An order for goods and services by a state agency from a specified outside vendor or seller (other than another state agency). It represents an obligation to pay for goods or services and formally encum- bers the funds to do so.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Used by OBM to define allocation units and by agencies to define their Spending Authority Codes (SACs).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: File contains request forms to restore a file or program on the AS/400 when needed.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in the opertating area for 1 year

series_description: File contain records of ledger computer printout itemizing the fees collected for plans evaluation and field inspections.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 1 year after records have been audited by Auditor of State, and report has been issued.

series_description: File contain invoices that are sent out after the inspection of an elevator has been made. Elevators are inspected twice a year.
retention_statement: Paper: Keep in off-site storage for 3 years after audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released.

series_description: Originals documents detailing the composite assets of the Savings and Loan Assurance Corporation, (SLAC) and the related obligations to the Dept. of Commerce and the Division of Unclaimed Funds.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy of all "SLAC" documents in vault area permanently

series_description: General ledger records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: Official Certifications issued by the Boards of Elections showing the results of ongoing Local Option Elections. These Certifications are used to determine the issuance of Liquor Permits in a particular area, as to WET or DRY status.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in the office area for 5 years ; Microform: Retain microfilm in the office area Pemanently. Duplicate copy kept off-site

series_description: This data includes: local option votes, active permit holders, 10yr agency control, YTD fee distribution, bailment purchase orders, store total file (final dump), District summary file (final dump), original brand summary, brand summary (80/80), payroll-employee master and detail, capital assets history, reformatted accounting records, YTD agency control, and item record file (final dump).
retention_statement: Electronic: Information is retained for 5 years

series_description: Lists of liquor prices in Ohio.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in the office area for 2 years

series_description: This file contains a list of American Express cards that are issued to employees who travel on state business.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: Employees' personnel file contains civil service applications, immigration form, attendance records, performance evaluations, direct deposit information, tax information, address change, verification of employment, P.E.R.S. employee exit form, personnel a
retention_statement: Microform: Retain master in off-site storage permanently. Retain diazo in operatating area permanently ; Paper: Retain active employees' and commission members records in the operating area until employee's employment has been terminated or until commission or board member term has expired. Retain these inactive records for 5 years

series_description: Reports of financial condition of savings banks as required by Section 1163.09 of the Ohio Revised Code.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in operating area four years

series_description: File contains documentation on how the Halon system is operated in the event that there is a fire in the computer room.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain the hard copy computer records of the Halon system in the computer room, until this system is no longer being used in the department
